text.title: Figma AI Ecosystem Boundary Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "workflow_id": "marketing-image-batch", "surface": "hybrid", "actor": "hybrid", "handoff_point": "Agent prepares prompts + brand pre-filter; designer pastes into Figma Image Tools and commits.", "revisit_date": "2026-08-22", "rationale": "Image Tools is UI-only; agent prepares prompts deterministically; designer commits with quality gate." }

example.note: Claims agent drives Make (UI-only); missing rationale + revisit_date.

forbidden.pattern: Output MUST NOT contain placeholder values listed in the validator script PLACEHOLDERS set. Reject any field whose value matches case-insensitively.
